policy: Reconstruct from official source; AMBIENT ships reconstruct.py, never a redistributed or merged archive. This keeps each license intact and avoids forcing the strictest license onto a bundle.

beam.name: BEAM: Beyond a Million Tokens
beam.question_provenance: partial: most abilities carry source_chat_ids (verified ~355/400 small-tier segments, 8/10 abilities; abstention has none by design)
beam.scoring: correctness always; where source_chat_ids is present it also scores the traced-outside-model half; pair with LongMemEval where absent
beam.sharealike_note: Do not redistribute a modified BEAM corpus except under CC BY-SA 4.0; reconstruct-from-source avoids this.
beam.citation: Tavakoli, M., Salemi, A., Ye, C., Abdalla, M., Zamani, H., Mitchell, J.R. 'Beyond a Million Tokens: Benchmarking and Enhancing Long-Term Memory in LLMs.' arXiv:2510.27246, 2025.

longmemeval.name: LongMemEval
longmemeval.scoring: supports both halves of segment completion: correctness AND support traced to answer_session_ids
longmemeval.citation: Wu, D., Wang, H., Yu, W., Zhang, Y., Chang, K-W., Yu, D. 'LongMemEval: Benchmarking Chat Assistants on Long-Term Interactive Memory.' ICLR 2025, arXiv:2410.10813. Copyright (c) 2024 Di Wu (MIT).

locomo.name: LoCoMo
locomo.paper: arXiv:2402.17753 (Maharana et al., ACL 2024, Snap Research)
locomo.reason: NonCommercial clause blocks any commercial or monetized-leaderboard AMBIENT; LongMemEval covers the same small-tier pull + attribution role under MIT. Crawled images carry a second, independent rights caveat.
